title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code in three deployment modes: desktop app, terminal CLI, and VS Code integration. The example project is a resume and cover letter generator with personalization and suggestion features.
